productTitle: Quectel mini-PCIe 4G LTE modem module US
name: Quectel mini-PCIe 4G LTE modem module US
title: Quectel mini-PCIe 4G LTE modem module US
short_description: Quectel EC25-AFX - mini-PCIe 4G LTE modem module for US market, LTE Cat4 up to 150Mbps/50Mbps, supports 3G/4G, integrated GNSS (GPS/GLONASS/BeiDou/Galileo/QZSS)
description: The Quectel EC25-AFX is a mini-PCIe 4G LTE modem module tailored for the U.S. market. This module is part of Quectel’s EC25 series, which is renowned for delivering reliable, high-speed mobile data connectivity. The EC25-AFX offers comprehensive support for multiple LTE bands tailored to North American carriers, making it a versatile solution for integrating LTE technology into products ranging from industrial applications to consumer electronics. It is engineered to be a highly reliable and scalable solution for IoT and M2M applications, including industrial routers, home gateways, set-top boxes, and surveillance systems. EC25 series is compatible with Quectel multimode LTE Standard EC21 series/EC20 R2.1/EG25-G/EG21-G modules and UMTS/HSPA+ UC200T series modules, which allows for flexible migration among them in design and manufacturing.

detailed_description.text: The Quectel EC25-AFX is a mini-PCIe 4G LTE modem module tailored for the U.S. market. This module is part of Quectel’s EC25 series, which is renowned for delivering reliable, high-speed mobile data connectivity. The EC25-AFX offers comprehensive support for multiple LTE bands tailored to North American carriers, making it a versatile solution for integrating LTE technology into products ranging from industrial applications to consumer electronics. It is engineered to be a highly reliable and scalable solution for IoT and M2M applications, including industrial routers, home gateways, set-top boxes, and surveillance systems. EC25 series is compatible with Quectel multimode LTE Standard EC21 series/EC20 R2.1/EG25-G/EG21-G modules and UMTS/HSPA+ UC200T series modules, which allows for flexible migration among them in design and manufacturing.

The EC25-AFX module operates under LTE Category 4, providing maximum download speeds of up to 150 Mbps and upload speeds of 50 Mbps. This high level of performance supports a wide range of data-intensive applications, including video streaming, high-speed data transmission, and online gaming. The module conforms to the mini-PCIe form factor, widely used in the industry, ensuring easy integration into devices with existing mini-PCIe slots. This standardization allows for straightforward implementation in a variety of host devices such as routers, gateways, and industrial PCs.

The EC25-AFX supports a broad spectrum of LTE frequency bands used by North American carriers. This includes bands conducive to both urban and rural deployment, enhancing its usability across diverse geographic regions. This module supports multiple frequency bands like LTE FDD and WCDMA. Furthermore, EC25-AFX module card supports Qualcomm® IZat™ location technology Gen8C Lite (for GPS, GLONASS, BeiDou/Compass, Galileo and QZSS). The integrated GNSS greatly simplifies product design, and provides quicker, more accurate and more dependable positioning.

In addition, a rich set of Internet protocols, industry-standard interfaces and abundant functionalities (USB serial drivers for Windows 7/8/8.1/10, Linux, Android) extend the applicability of the module to a wide range of M2M and IoT applications such as industrial router, industrial PDA, rugged tablet PC, video surveillance, and digital signage.
